subject: Re:
body:
I wouold like to know what happened to all the furniture.. , don't worry, 

----- Original Message ----
From: gmax <gmax1@ellmax.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 14, 2008 9:55:41 PM
Subject: 

Hey, the chandalier from PB has vanished - the one you liked and that  
was valuable - I am so sorry..it is missing along with the lucite  
desk that used to be in my office. I am very upset as I know that you  
liked it and wanted it put up, and that you said it was v valuable. I  
had Doug go through all the storage units today to finally say once  
and for all that it is gone. Should I claim for it on insurance along  
with the desk?
I am sorry
